title: Newtype May 10th issue interviews
wikitext:
[]: Newtype May 10th issue interviews             Quote Post by 惣流・アスカ・ラングレー » Sun May 09, 2021 10:27 pm hi all, this thread is for the discussion of the 30 interviews featured in the may 10th issue of newtype with the three eva girls in their white plugsuits on the cover.

[]: Re: Newtype May 10th issue interviews             Quote Post by 惣流・アスカ・ラングレー » Sun May 09, 2021 10:33 pm a section of the interview with megumi ogata concerning Shinji and mari’s interactions "She was told 'pull out the spear and get rid of it' but then she was in despair and knew he might be able to do something about it. She said 'I don't care'" "But I think it's natural to think 'If everyone gets well, it's fine'. I 'm glad I was able to settle with everyone this time." --Ms. Ogata, What kind of woman was Mari Illustrious? Ogata: I didn't know until the end ... because Shinji didn't even know her name until the end. --It's always someone else. Ogata: That's right, isn't it. Maybe. She was like a friend of his father and mother, right? At the end, I thought she would come to him to pick up that position. 5ch comment: Ogata outburst in dissatisfaction. Ogata doesn't seem to recognize Mari as his lover either "Someone else" ... I think that felt strange. --It has been 28 years since the TV series, and after repeating it many times, the last scene of all time has finally been drawn. How did you feel? Ogata: I'm glad you guys think so. However, I don't feel like I'm done yet. I felt like I was left in a world of work at 14 years old because I didn't do the last Shinji. --Is there another world that doesn't lead to that last scene? I still doubt haha. Ogata: It may lead to a sensation that it is not over. I'm really grateful that I've been able to stay close to you for such a long time.

[]: Re: Newtype May 10th issue interviews             Quote Post by bogusman » Sun May 09, 2021 10:42 pm Wow, this is very interesting. Thank u very much mate !

[]: Re: Newtype May 10th issue interviews             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sun May 09, 2021 10:43 pm I forgot this was happening today. Thanks for the translation!

[]: Re: Newtype May 10th issue interviews             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sun May 09, 2021 10:50 pm So even Ogata is going all "IDK what happened". Curious. This apparently has interviews with 30 (!) staff members so it's probably full of gold.

[]: Re: Newtype May 10th issue interviews             Quote Post by 惣流・アスカ・ラングレー » Sun May 09, 2021 11:00 pm a section of the interview with yuko miyamura and tetsuya iwanaga concerning Asuka and kensuke’s interactions Yuko Miyamura “I can understand why Asuka fans are upset with "What’s up with Kenken!” But in my opinion, it's not a relationship to worry about.” "Think about it: a 28-year-old adult and a 14-year-old. The body. It's not possible, please calm down!” “Kensuke is a good guy. If he was a good guy, he wouldn't touch her.” “If Asuka was lonely and wanted to be pampered, she would just say, "Okay, okay.” There is no more than that. In other words, Kensuke is a good guy. And that's what I think.” Tetsuya Iwanaga “I'm sure you'll agree with me. I believe I was able to save Asuka.” “I think it's up to each fan to imagine the relationship between the two.” “Kensuke is a good guy, so he won't touch her. I think that's all.”

[]: Re: Newtype May 10th issue interviews             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon May 10, 2021 5:33 am i want to see all of this in full context before forming any opinions or conclusions. There seems to be a whole lot of, "it's all deliberately up to the interpretation" but that was the same for the old series, too. Does anyone have complete scans or the physical magazine?

[]: Re: Newtype May 10th issue interviews             Quote Post by Konja7 » Mon May 10, 2021 6:01 am Kendrix wrote: There seems to be a whole lot of, "it's all deliberately up to the interpretation" but that was the same for the old series, too.

[]: Re: Newtype May 10th issue interviews             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon May 10, 2021 2:51 pm Even Shinji's VA doesn't know WTF is going on in the epilogue! Konja7 wrote: It's even possible Miyamura and Iwanaga may not even have noticed that Asuka came back from Instrumentality as an adult. These scenes were not spoke.

[]: Re: Newtype May 10th issue interviews             Quote Post by Konja7 » Mon May 10, 2021 3:05 pm ElMariachi wrote: Even Shinji's VA doesn't know WTF is going on in the epilogue!

[]: Re: Newtype May 10th issue interviews             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon May 10, 2021 3:21 pm Konja7 wrote: ElMariachi#922451 wrote: Even Shinji's VA doesn't know WTF is going on in the epilogue!

[]: Re: Newtype May 10th issue interviews             Quote Post by Makki » Mon May 10, 2021 5:16 pm Snippet from Director Tsurumaki's interview, he seems to confirm his intention to portray Kensuke/Asuka as a romantic relationship. https://twitter.com/Shengong4/status/1391739123870826500/photo/1 >Anno came up with the idea of all the pairings >Tsurumaki helped develop the relationships >One of the scenes that stood out most to Tsurumaki was the part where Kensuke films Asuka, he describes it as a love scene between the two of them >Tsurumaki developed their relationship as an old married couple >Tsurumaki hopes the fans who wanted Asuka to be happy all this time will enjoy it

[]: Re: Newtype May 10th issue interviews             Quote Post by Konja7 » Mon May 10, 2021 5:56 pm Makki wrote: Snippet from Director Tsurumaki's interview, he seems to confirm his intention to portray Kensuke/Asuka as a romantic relationship. https://twitter.com/Shengong4/status/1391739123870826500/photo/1 >Anno came up with the idea of all the pairings >Tsurumaki helped develop the relationships >One of the scenes that stood out most to Tsurumaki was the part where Kensuke films Asuka, he describes it as a love scene between the two of them >Tsurumaki developed their relationship as an old married couple >Tsurumaki hopes the fans who wanted Asuka to be happy all this time will enjoy it

[]: Re: Newtype May 10th issue interviews             Quote Post by Makki » Mon May 10, 2021 6:10 pm I'm pretty surprised, since that's quite different from what Miyamura said the directors had asked her for.

[]: Re: Newtype May 10th issue interviews             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon May 10, 2021 6:22 pm Konja7 wrote: I'm pretty surprised, since that's quite different from what Miyamura said the directors had asked her for.

[]: Re: Newtype May 10th issue interviews             Quote Post by bogusman » Mon May 10, 2021 6:45 pm Makki wrote: Snippet from Director Tsurumaki's interview, he seems to confirm his intention to portray Kensuke/Asuka as a romantic relationship. https://twitter.com/Shengong4/status/1391739123870826500/photo/1 >Anno came up with the idea of all the pairings >Tsurumaki helped develop the relationships >One of the scenes that stood out most to Tsurumaki was the part where Kensuke films Asuka, he describes it as a love scene between the two of them >Tsurumaki developed their relationship as an old married couple >Tsurumaki hopes the fans who wanted Asuka to be happy all this time will enjoy it

[]: Re: Newtype May 10th issue interviews             Quote Post by Konja7 » Mon May 10, 2021 7:23 pm Kendrix wrote: We seem to be very solidly in "up to interpretation, but intended as a possible reading" territory. (Same as the Mari thing, really; the jp comment sections under her promotion reel were an even split between reading her as a mentor & reading her as flirty. Ogata seems to prefer the "friendship" reading for Kaworu, though she's acknowledged the ambiguity and, as per Shizo/Parano, the love interest reading was intended as A possible interpretation) The purpose of the ambiguity is probably the same as with Kaworu: So that the viewer can imagine whichever would comfort them the most if they were in Shinji/ Asuka's place. After all, they're supposed to represent the experience of being accepted just as you are. For some people that includes being wanted romantically, for others, they'd feel that was an extra expectation & would find a BFF more comforting. (though Kaworu of course comes with the 'catch' of tragedy)

[]: Re: Newtype May 10th issue interviews             Quote Post by Makki » Mon May 10, 2021 7:31 pm I have transcribed the Japanese text from that picture of the interview and translated it. I'm JLPT N2 so you can trust in my Japanese ability lol, but if other Japanese speakers here want to give their own translations go ahead. The first part is Director Tsurumaki, the second part is from the animator Yasabe. ヒカリが大人になっているというのはうれしかったです。 みんなの関係は、庵野さんが決めていることもあれば決めていないこともあるようで。 私はいろいろと想像しながら描いています。 たとえば、ケンスケは長い時間、アスカを支えてきたのだから、老夫婦のような雰囲気に見えるようにとか。監督たちの意図をくみつつ、足りないところは補完して考えながら描いています。 -個人的に印象に残っているカットはありますか？ 谷田部：ケンスケがアスカにビデオカメラを向けるシーンは「ここはラブシートのようなものなんだよ」と指示がありました。アスカが幸せになるのは、これまで見てきたファンの方もうれしいんじゃないかと、ていねいに描こうと思っています。 ..I was happy Hikari became an adult. Anno decided on all the characters relationships, though there were also aspects he didn't decide on. So I thought up all sorts of things filling in the blanks as I drew the plot/scenes. For example, Kensuke has supported Asuka for a long period of time, so I wanted to give off the feeling of them looking like an old married couple. I assembled the intentions of all the directors, and filled* (uses same word as complementation) in the parts that were still lacking as I drew the plot/scenes. -Are there any scenes that personally left an impression on you? Yatabe: During the scene where Kensuke points his video camera at Asuka, I was given the instruction that "This is a Love* Scene" (They use the term ラブシーン, specifically meaning romantic love scene). I drew the scene very carefully so the fans who watched up until now that wanted to see Asuka become happy could become happy too.

[]: Re: Newtype May 10th issue interviews             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon May 10, 2021 7:38 pm Aha, thank you for the clarification!

[]: Re: Newtype May 10th issue interviews             Quote Post by Konja7 » Mon May 10, 2021 7:49 pm Makki wrote: ..I was happy Hikari became an adult. Anno decided on all the characters relationships, though there were also aspects he didn't decide on. So I thought up all sorts of things filling in the blanks as I drew the plot/scenes. For example, Kensuke has supported Asuka for a long period of time, so I wanted to give off the feeling of them looking like an old married couple. I assembled the intentions of all the directors, and filled* (uses same word as complementation) in the parts that were still lacking as I drew the plot/scenes. -Are there any scenes that personally left an impression on you? Yatabe: During the scene where Kensuke points his video camera at Asuka, I was given the instruction that "This is a Love* Scene" (They use the term ラブシーン, specifically meaning romantic love scene). I drew the scene very carefully so the fans who watched up until now that wanted to see Asuka become happy could become happy too.
